nasb.text: Now it came about after this that the sons of Moab and the sons of Ammon, together with some of the Meunites, came to make war against Jehoshaphat.

esv.text: After this the Moabites and Ammonites, and with them some of the Meunites, came against Jehoshaphat for battle.

cnv.text: 後來，摩押人、亞捫人和一些米烏尼人，一同來攻擊約沙法。

ccb.text: 后来摩押人、亚扪人同一些米乌尼人一起来攻打约沙法。
